title: draba schultzei
intro: Draba schultzei, also known as Schultze's whitlow grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Draba schultzei include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its antimicrobial properties which can help prevent infections. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including teas and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
